title: Chat textarea does not respond to standard browser fill automation
description: The chat textarea does not respond to standard browser automation fill commands. Requires using JavaScript nativeInputValueSetter to programmatically set values and trigger React's synthetic event system.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Navigate to http://localhost:1927
2. Try to fill the chat textarea using browser automation fill command
3. Observe that the value is not set
expected: Standard fill command should populate the textarea
actual: Fill command completes without error but textarea remains empty
impact: Automation-only issue. Does not affect manual user interaction.
